flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Adams State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.2k vs 1.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Adams State University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.9k → $21.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Adams State University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.2k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Adams State University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (59.2% → 50.7%).
